response.global_analysis: The audio consists of a monologue by Roboco-san followed by a live performance of 'DAN DAN 心魅かれてく'. The monologue includes several puns on 'Encore' and 'Alcohol'. The song transcription matches the phonetics of the audio. The provided Reference JSON only covers the first part of the song, so I have transcribed and translated the remaining lyrics from the audio. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal start and end points.

subtitles.original: そして、
subtitles.english: And then,

subtitles.original: この後はなんと
subtitles.english: what comes next is,

subtitles.original: 実は初めての
subtitles.english: actually, for the first time...

subtitles.original: メインえ、アル、アル... アルコールライブがあります！
subtitles.english: the main ev... al... al... alcohol live!

subtitles.original: 酒は飲んでも飲まれるな！
subtitles.english: Don't let the alcohol drink you!

subtitles.original: 最近お酒飲んでない
subtitles.english: I haven't been drinking lately.

subtitles.original: アンコールとアルコール、似てるんだわ
subtitles.english: 'Encore' and 'Alcohol' sound similar.

subtitles.original: はい。というわけで、なんと今回はね
subtitles.english: Yes. So, surprisingly this time...

subtitles.original: アンコールライブがありますので
subtitles.english: ...there's an encore live!

subtitles.original: みんながずっと僕に歌ってほしそうだった、あの曲を歌っちゃおうかなと思ってます
subtitles.english: I'm going to sing that song that everyone has been wanting me to sing.

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててくださーい！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: せっかくですからね、写真撮影会とかね
subtitles.english: Since we're here, maybe a photo session or...

subtitles.original: ロボさーと密な空間でいっぱい見せちゃおうかなって思ってます
subtitles.english: ...showing you plenty in a close-knit space with the Robosa.

subtitles.original: メンバーのプレゼントもありがとね！みんなぜひ見ててください！
subtitles.english: Thanks for the membership gifts too! Everyone, please watch!

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、ロボさー
subtitles.english: Yes. So, Robosa...

subtitles.original: 早いけど、次が最後の曲になっちゃうみたいです
subtitles.english: it's early, but it looks like the next one will be the last song.

subtitles.original: 僕はもう、９歳
subtitles.english: I'm already 9 years old.

subtitles.original: ９歳になってるロボさー、ここまで成長を見届けてくれてありがとね
subtitles.english: Robosa, thank you for watching me grow to be 9 years old.

subtitles.original: これからもまだまだ僕は成長していくので、一緒に末長く楽しんでいきましょう！
subtitles.english: I'll keep growing, so let's enjoy our time together for a long time!

subtitles.original: 最後の曲は、初めにちらっと言ったけど
subtitles.english: The last song, as I mentioned briefly at the start...

subtitles.original: ドラゴンくんに乗りたいな！
subtitles.english: ...is I want to ride Dragon-kun!

subtitles.original: 一緒に頑張ってくれる？ね、ドラゴンくん？
subtitles.english: Will you do your best with me? Right, Dragon-kun?

subtitles.original: DAN DAN 心魅かれてく
subtitles.english: Bit by bit, my heart is charmed by you

subtitles.original: その眩しい笑顔に
subtitles.english: By that dazzling smile

subtitles.original: 果てない暗闇から飛び出そう
subtitles.english: Let's fly out of the endless darkness

subtitles.original: Hold my hand
subtitles.english: Hold my hand

subtitles.original: 君と出会ったとき
subtitles.english: When I met you,

subtitles.original: 子供のころ大切に思っていた
subtitles.english: I remembered the scenery

subtitles.original: 景色を思い出したんだ
subtitles.english: I cherished in my childhood.

subtitles.original: 僕と踊ってくれないか
subtitles.english: Won't you dance with me?

subtitles.original: 光と影の Winding Road
subtitles.english: On the winding road of light and shadow,

subtitles.original: 今でも あいつに夢中なの？
subtitles.english: are you still crazy about him?

subtitles.original: 少しずつ 振り向いて
subtitles.english: Turn around little by little,

subtitles.original: 確かめたくなるような 時もあるけど
subtitles.english: even though there are times I want to make sure.

subtitles.original: 愛と勇気と誇りを持って 闘うよ
subtitles.english: I'll fight with love, courage, and pride.

subtitles.original: DAN DAN 心魅かれてく
subtitles.english: Bit by bit, my heart is charmed by you,

subtitles.original: この星の希望の欠片
subtitles.english: pieces of hope of this star.

subtitles.original: きっと誰もが 永遠を手にいれたい
subtitles.english: Surely everyone wants to obtain eternity.

subtitles.original: ぜんぜん 気にしないフリしても
subtitles.english: Even if I pretend not to care at all,

subtitles.original: ほら 君に恋してる
subtitles.english: look, I'm in love with you.

subtitles.original: 果てない暗闇から飛び出そう
subtitles.english: Let's fly out of the endless darkness,

subtitles.original: Hold my hand
subtitles.english: Hold my hand.

subtitles.original: 怒った顔も疲れてる 君も好きだけど
subtitles.english: I love you even when you're angry or look tired,

subtitles.original: あんなに飛ばして生きて大丈夫かなと思う
subtitles.english: but I wonder if you're okay, living at such a pace.

subtitles.original: 僕はなにげない仕草に 振り回されてる 潮風に
subtitles.english: I'm tossed around by your casual gestures and the sea breeze.

subtitles.original: それでも あいつに夢中なの？
subtitles.english: Even so, are you still crazy about him?

subtitles.original: もっと聞きたいことがあったのに
subtitles.english: There was more I wanted to ask,

subtitles.original: 二人の会話が車の音に
subtitles.english: but our conversation was drowned out

subtitles.original: 阻まれて通りに舞うよ
subtitles.english: by the sound of cars, dancing on the street.

subtitles.original: DAN DAN 心魅かれてく
subtitles.english: Bit by bit, my heart is charmed by you.

subtitles.original: 自分でも不思議なんだけど
subtitles.english: It's strange even to me,

subtitles.original: 何かあるとすぐに 君に電話したくなる
subtitles.english: but whenever something happens, I want to call you.

subtitles.original: 全然気のないフリしても
subtitles.english: Even if I pretend to have no interest at all...
